sentences.target: J'ai vu une apparition dans le couloir.
sentences.reading: /ʒe vy yn a.pa.ʁi.sjɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ku.lwaʁ/

translations.fr: J'ai vu une apparition dans le couloir.
translations.ipa: /ʒe vy yn a.pa.ʁi.sjɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ku.lwaʁ/
translations.en: I saw a ghost in the hallway.
translations.es: Vi un fantasma en el pasillo.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Geist im Flur gesehen.
translations.it: Ho visto un fantasma nel corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在走廊里看见了一个鬼。
translations.pt: Eu vi um fantasma no corredor.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một con ma trong hành lang.
translations.nl: Ik zag een spook in de gang.
translations.hi: मैंने गलियारे में एक भूत देखा.
translations.nb: Jeg så et spøkelse i gangen.
translations.sv: Jag såg ett spöke i korridoren.
translations.ro: Am văzut o fantomă pe hol.
translations.da: Jeg så et spøgelse i gangen.

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular), elided before vowel; subject of the auxiliary "ai".
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 1sg) forming the passé composé with the participle "vu".
Past participle of a lexical verb; head of the compound predicate with "ai"; selects the direct object "une apparition".
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of "apparition".
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "ai vu".
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of "couloir".
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition "dans".

translations.en: We’re waiting for the bus to appear.
translations.es: Estamos esperando a que llegue el autobús.
translations.de: Wir warten darauf, dass der Bus kommt.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando que o ônibus chegue.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi xe buýt đến.
translations.nl: We wachten tot de bus komt.
translations.hi: हम बस के आने का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi venter på at bussen skal komme.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på att bussen ska komma.
translations.da: Vi venter på, at bussen kommer.
translations.ja: バスが来るのを待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; subject of "attend".
Main verb (present indicative, 3sg); takes "l'apparition" as direct object.
Definite article clitic, elided before vowel; determiner of "apparition".
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "attend".
Contraction of preposition "de" + article "le"; introduces the nominal complement "bus" linked to "apparition".
Common noun, masculine; complement of "de" (in "du bus") modifying "apparition".

sentences.target: Les enfants filment l'apparition des lucioles.

translations.fr: Les enfants filment l'apparition des lucioles.
translations.en: The kids are filming fireflies appearing.
translations.es: Los niños están grabando cómo aparecen las luciérnagas.
translations.de: Die Kinder filmen, wie die Glühwürmchen erscheinen.
translations.it: I bambini stanno filmando le lucciole che compaiono.
translations.ko: 아이들이 반딧불이가 나타나는 모습을 찍고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们正在拍萤火虫出现的样子。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺度拍緊螢火蟲出現嘅情景。
translations.pt: As crianças estão filmando os vagalumes aparecendo.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang quay cảnh đom đóm xuất hiện.
translations.nl: De kinderen filmen hoe de glimwormen verschijnen.
translations.hu: A gyerekek felveszik, ahogy megjelennek a szentjánosbogarak.
translations.hi: बच्चे जुगनुओं के दिखने का वीडियो बना रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci nagrywają, jak pojawiają się świetliki.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά βιντεοσκοπούν τις πυγολαμπίδες που εμφανίζονται.
translations.nb: Barna filmer når ildfluene dukker opp.
translations.sv: Barnen filmar när eldflugorna dyker upp.
translations.cs: Děti natáčejí, jak se objevují světlušky.
translations.da: Børnene filmer, når ildfluerne dukker op.
translations.ja: 子どもたちがホタルが現れる様子を撮影している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner of "enfants".
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of "filment".
Main verb (present indicative, 3pl); governs the direct object "l'apparition".
Definite article clitic, elided before vowel; determiner of "apparition".
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "filment"; head of an NP with complement "des lucioles".
Contraction of "de" + "les"; introduces the plural nominal complement "lucioles" linked to "apparition".
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of "de" (in "des lucioles") modifying "apparition".

sentences.target: Je déteste l'apparition de pubs agressives.

translations.fr: Je déteste l'apparition de pubs agressives.
translations.en: I hate when aggressive ads appear.
translations.de: Ich hasse es, wenn aggressive Werbung auftaucht.
translations.zh-Hans: 我讨厌那些咄咄逼人的广告突然弹出来。
translations.yue: 我好憎啲咄咄逼人嘅廣告彈出嚟。
translations.ru: Я ненавижу, когда всплывает агрессивная реклама.
translations.pt: Eu odeio quando aparecem anúncios agressivos.
translations.vi: Tôi ghét khi những quảng cáo gây phiền phức hiện lên.
translations.nl: Ik haat het als agressieve advertenties opduiken.
translations.uk: Я ненавиджу, коли з’являється агресивна реклама.
translations.hi: मुझे नफ़रत है जब आक्रामक विज्ञापन दिखाई देते हैं.
translations.pl: Nienawidzę, gdy pojawiają się agresywne reklamy.
translations.nb: Jeg hater når aggressive annonser dukker opp.
translations.id: Saya benci ketika iklan agresif muncul.
translations.sv: Jag hatar när aggressiv reklam dyker upp.
translations.cs: Nesnáším, když se objevují agresivní reklamy.
translations.da: Jeg hader, når aggressive annoncer dukker op.
translations.ja: 攻撃的な広告が表示されるのは大嫌いだ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of "déteste".
Main verb (present indicative, 1sg); takes "l'apparition" as direct object.
Definite article clitic, elided before vowel; determiner of "apparition".
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "déteste"; head of NP taking the complement "de pubs agressives".
Preposition introducing a nominal complement; links "pubs agressives" to "apparition".
Common noun, feminine plural (colloquial for "publicité"); complement of "de".
Adjective, feminine plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing in gender and number with "pubs".
